description: Rise of Avalon Patch 12 (13 January 2021) — Silver economy adjustments, Satchels/Tomes of Insight, Corrupted Dungeons, Smart Cluster Queue, Mobile, and bug fixes.

sections.heading: Changes
sections.searchable_text: Silver Black Market generated Lowered 15% drops non-Expedition mobs Increased 15% Satchels Insight Tomes Respec Fame Credit cost 0.75 0.9 Silver Satchels cost decreased 30% Tomes dropped mobs decreased 10% Fame gain Satchels increased 10% Corrupted Dungeons rare legendary loot chests book chests boss chests Stalker Slayer 17.5% player kill loot 50% 100% Smart Cluster Queue deactivation skip overcrowded clusters 2 minutes Mobile Android iOS graphics resolution Other Changes Duels draw island Hideout territory commander chat message

subsections.heading: Silver
subsections.searchable_text: Silver Black Market generated Lowered 15% drops non-Expedition mobs Increased 15%

changes.raw_text: Lowered global amount of Silver generated by the Black Market by 15%
notes: Lowered global amount of Silver generated by the Black Market by 15%

changes.raw_text: Increased Silver drops from all non-Expedition mobs by 15%
notes: Increased Silver drops from all non-Expedition mobs by 15%

subsections.heading: Satchels of Insight, Tomes of Insight, and Respec
subsections.searchable_text: Respec Fame Credit cost 0.75 0.9 Satchels Insight Silver cost decreased 30% Tomes Insight dropped mobs decreased 10% Fame gain Satchels increased 10%

changes.raw_text: Increased cost per Respec Fame Credit from 0.75 to 0.9 Silver
Decreased the Silver cost of Fame from Satchels of Insight across all tiers by 30%
notes: Decreased Silver cost of Fame from Satchels of Insight across all tiers by 30%

changes.raw_text: Decreased the amount of Tomes of Insight dropped by mobs by 10%
notes: Decreased amount of Tomes of Insight dropped by mobs by 10%

changes.raw_text: Increased Fame gain from Satchels of Insight by 10%
notes: Increased Fame gain from Satchels of Insight by 10%

subsections.heading: Corrupted Dungeons
subsections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeons rare legendary loot chests book chests increased boss chests Stalker Slayer decreased 17.5% player kill loot 50% 100% PvP

changes.raw_text: Increased amount of rare and legendary loot chests appearing in Corrupted Dungeons, but reduced number of rare and legendary book chests accordingly
notes: Increased amount of rare and legendary loot chests
Reduced number of rare and legendary book chests accordingly

changes.raw_text: Decreased value of boss chests in Stalker and Slayer dungeons by 17.5%, but increased the percentage of boss loot received when killing another player from 50% to 100%

stats.name: Boss loot received on player kill

notes: Decreased value of boss chests in Stalker and Slayer dungeons by 17.5%
Intended to promote PvP in Corrupted Dungeons

subsections.heading: Smart Cluster Queue
subsections.searchable_text: Smart Cluster Queue deactivation update cycle player numbers skip overcrowded clusters 2 minutes

changes.raw_text: Updated deactivation conditions: the queue can now be deactivated in the middle of an update cycle if player numbers allow
notes: Queue can now be deactivated in the middle of an update cycle if player numbers allow

changes.raw_text: Players will no longer be able to skip overcrowded clusters within the first 2 minutes of queue activation
notes: Players can no longer skip overcrowded clusters within the first 2 minutes of queue activation

subsections.heading: Mobile
subsections.searchable_text: Mobile Android iOS reduced default graphics resolution Settings

changes.raw_text: Reduced default graphics resolution on Android and iOS; graphical quality can still be adjusted as usual in Settings
notes: Reduced default graphics resolution on Android and iOS
Graphical quality can still be adjusted in Settings

subsections.heading: Other Changes
subsections.searchable_text: Duels draw island Hideout removed territory commander attack chat message

changes.raw_text: Duels now end in a draw when either player is removed from an island or Hideout
notes: Duels now end in a draw when either player is removed from an island or Hideout

changes.raw_text: A chat message is now sent when the territory commander in an owned territory is under attack
notes: A chat message is now sent when the territory commander in an owned territory is under attack

sections.heading: Fixes
sections.searchable_text: Smart Cluster Queue UI distance exit Emergency Heal Guardian Helmet 5 targets dashes pulls knockbacks ground spell Firewall Onslaught Hand of Justice damage radius 3.5m pull stun 10 enemies Vile Curse Cursed Staffs AoE Area of Decay Rock Elementals Tremor tier 5 7 graphical animation audio terrain localization

subsections.heading: Fixes
subsections.searchable_text: Smart Cluster Queue UI incorrect distance exit Emergency Heal Guardian Helmet 5 targets dashes pulls knockbacks Firewall Onslaught Hand of Justice radius 3.5m 10 enemies Vile Curse AoE Area of Decay Rock Elementals Tremor tier 5 7

changes.raw_text: Fixed an issue where Smart Cluster Queue UI sometimes showed incorrect distance to exit
notes: Fixed an issue where Smart Cluster Queue UI sometimes showed incorrect distance to exit

changes.raw_text: Emergency Heal (Guardian Helmet) now affects a maximum of 5 targets (including caster) as intended
notes: Now affects a maximum of 5 targets (including caster) as intended

changes.raw_text: Fixed an issue where dashes/pulls/knockbacks would sometimes interact incorrectly with ground spell effects (such as Firewall)
notes: Fixed incorrect interaction with ground spell effects such as Firewall

changes.raw_text: Size of damage radius now matches that of other effect radii while spinning (3.5m); Maximum number of targets is now the same for pull, stun and damage while spinning (10 enemies)

stats.name: Max targets (pull, stun, damage) while spinning

notes: Size of damage radius now matches that of other effect radii while spinning (3.5m)
Maximum number of targets is now the same for pull, stun, and damage while spinning (10 enemies)

changes.raw_text: Vile Curse (Cursed Staffs) now triggers AoE escalation (for example via Area of Decay) as intended
notes: Now triggers AoE escalation (e.g. via Area of Decay) as intended

changes.raw_text: Tier 5 and 7 Rock Elementals have relearned their Tremor spell
notes: Tier 5 and 7 Rock Elementals have relearned their Tremor spell

changes.raw_text: Additional graphical, animation, audio, terrain, and localization fixes
notes: Additional graphical, animation, audio, terrain, and localization fixes
